mapper.sql: id, result_id, evaluation_period_id, student_id, detail_type, evaluation_dimension, score_category, source_type, source_id, source_code, source_name, source_date, score, score_before_cap, is_capped, cap_reason, behavior_type_id, behavior_type_code, confirmed, excluded, exclude_reason, remarks, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM student_evaluation_details WHERE result_id = #{resultId} ORDER BY evaluation_dimension, score_category, created_at

SELECT evaluation_dimension, score_category, COUNT(*) as item_count, SUM(score) as total_score, SUM(CASE WHEN is_capped = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as capped_count FROM student_evaluation_details WHERE result_id = #{resultId} AND excluded = 0 GROUP BY evaluation_dimension, score_category ORDER BY evaluation_dimension, score_category
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO student_evaluation_details ( id, result_id, evaluation_period_id, student_id, detail_type, evaluation_dimension, score_category, source_type, source_id, source_code, source_name, source_date, score, score_before_cap, is_capped, cap_reason, behavior_type_id, behavior_type_code, confirmed, excluded, exclude_reason, remarks, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.resultId}, #{item.evaluationPeriodId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.detailType}, #{item.evaluationDimension}, #{item.scoreCategory}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.sourceId}, #{item.sourceCode}, #{item.sourceName}, #{item.sourceDate}, #{item.score}, #{item.scoreBeforeCap}, #{item.isCapped}, #{item.capReason}, #{item.behaviorTypeId}, #{item.behaviorTypeCode}, #{item.confirmed}, #{item.excluded}, #{item.excludeReason}, #{item.remarks}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.detail_type as detailType, d.score_category as scoreCategory, d.source_type as sourceType, d.source_name as itemName, d.source_code as itemCode, d.source_date as sourceDate, d.score, d.score_before_cap as scoreBeforeCap, d.is_capped as isCapped, d.cap_reason as capReason, d.remarks as remark, d.confirmed, d.excluded FROM student_evaluation_details d WHERE d.result_id = #{resultId} AND d.evaluation_dimension = #{dimension} AND d.excluded = 0 ORDER BY d.score_category, d.source_date DESC, d.created_at DESC
